api.chooseApiProviderModelBelow: Choose an API provider model below.
api.defaultModelDescription: Pick the workspace default from the model lists configured below.
api.protocolDescription: Pick a protocol to edit its credentials.
api.providerModelsDescription: Add, edit, or remove the model IDs you want this provider to expose.
api.workspaceModelsDescription: Choose from the model lists configured under each provider.

feedback.installFailed: Unable to install local agent provider.
feedback.updateFailed: Failed to update local agent settings. Please try again.

codexImagegen.description: Choose how non-Codex local agents handle delegation to Codex Image 2.0.

always.description: Allow future matching requests to use Codex image generation automatically.
always.label: Always delegate

ask.description: Ask before every non-Codex agent delegation.
ask.label: Ask each time

never.description: Block Codex image generation delegation from non-Codex agents.
never.label: Never delegate

codexImagegen.title: Codex image delegation

local.description: Pick the CLI route generations should use.
local.empty: No local CLI models detected yet. Rescan after installing or signing in to a supported local CLI.
local.fetchedDescription: Fetched from the CLI when it exposes models. Custom lets you type any model id this CLI accepts.
local.installHint: Install Codex or Claude Code, then rescan to enable local agent routes.

tuttiManaged.bridgeUnavailable: Open AI Media Canvas inside Tutti to authorize managed models.
tuttiManaged.chooseModel: Choose a Tutti Managed model below.
tuttiManaged.connectFirst: Connect to Tutti Managed to import available models.
tuttiManaged.description: Use model credentials managed by Tutti without storing provider keys in this app.
tuttiManaged.emptyModels: No Tutti Managed models are available. Configure providers in Tutti settings.

feedback.connectFailed: Unable to connect Tutti Managed models.
feedback.disconnectFailed: Unable to disconnect Tutti Managed models.

tuttiManaged.title: Tutti Managed

general.description: Control interface language and local display preferences.
general.languageDescription: Saved in this browser and reused the next time you open the app.
general.title: General

agnesHint.description: Agnes offers a free starter route.

agnes.summary: Agnes multimodal route. Uses agnes-ai-cli for image/video generation, including compose and keyframe-capable video modes.

google.summary: Google AI Studio / Developer API route. Best for Nano Banana and Google-official image/video families.

kie.summary: Third-party aggregation route for Kie Market image and video models, including Seedream, Nano Banana, Runway, Veo, Kling, and Seedance.

openai.summary: OpenAI-compatible image route. Uses the same key/base URL pair as the OpenAI-compatible agent protocol.

replicate.summary: Third-party hosted models. Use this when you want Seedream, Seedance, Kling, or Replicate-routed Veo/Sora families.

vertex.summary: Google Cloud hosted route. Uses Vertex project and locations, with service-account credentials still coming from env.

volces.summary: ByteDance / Volcengine's official channel. Use this for Doubao Seedream models served through Ark.

media.description: Configure image and video providers by platform. If the same model family exists on multiple platforms later, AIMC keeps them separate by provider-scoped model IDs so you can choose the route explicitly.

feedback.updateFailed: Failed to update local media provider settings. Please try again.

media.localStorageNote: These values are stored in the local sqlite settings database and reused by the matching media providers.

providerNotes.volces: {{provider}} is the ByteDance / Volcengine official channel.

media.title: Media Providers

modelConfiguration.description: Agnes provides free text, image, and video model routes. Apply for an API key before configuring it.

status.loadFailed: Failed to load local settings. Please try again.
status.loadUnavailable: Unable to load local settings right now.
